creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194458
p5-Net-Flow-1.003.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net/p5-Net-Flow to 1.003 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Net-Flow

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE_*
- added NO_ARCH
- added EXAMPLES option with appropriate target and variables
- updated pkg-plist

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK

make test (both amd64 + i386) results:

> All tests successful.
> Files=1, Tests=12,  0 wallclock secs ( 0.02 usr  0.02 sys +  0.05 cusr  0.04 csys =  0.12 CPU)
> Result: PASS
